g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does user input reach the Nova pipeline from voice and text?')
sendPrompt('What is the Supervisor Decision Layer in Nova? Is this the ManagerAgent?')
sendPrompt('How does execution mode selection work in Nova? What triggers each of the three modes?')
sendPrompt('How does Direct AI mode work in Nova? When is it chosen over tool or agent mode?')
sendPrompt('How does Tool mode work in Nova? How does try_ai_tool select and run a tool?')
sendPrompt('How does Agent/Planning mode work in Nova? What triggers the Planner and ReAct loop?')
sendPrompt('How does the Executor handle direct AI and tool responses in Nova?')
sendPrompt('How does TaskPlanner decompose tasks in Nova? What does it pass to the Manager?')
sendPrompt('How does ManagerAgent orchestrate multi-step tasks in Nova?')
sendPrompt('How does AgentExecutor run the planned steps in Nova?')
sendPrompt('How does the Supervisor merge results from different execution paths in Nova?')
sendPrompt('What are all the output channels in Nova? How do GUI, TTS and web interface work together?')
